meta.title: Plancha360 — The grill you stand around, not behind.
meta.description: Plancha360 is a round, gas-fired plancha built for the way people actually want to cook outside — together. Everyone gathers around the same surface, food in the middle, drink in hand, host included.

nav.langToggleLabel: Cambiar a la versión en español

hero.headline: The grill you stand around, not behind.
hero.subline: Plancha360 is a round, gas-fired plancha built for the way people actually want to cook outside — together. Everyone gathers around the same surface, food in the middle, drink in hand, host included.

story.headline: Ten years of better evenings.
story.p1: Plancha360 didn't start as a business. It started in my parents' garden in Germany. Ten years ago my father had a round plancha built by a metalworker who made them as a hobby. Every birthday, every gathering, every time we had people over, that grill was the center of the evening.
story.p2: What stuck with me wasn't the food. It was that nobody was left out. You could cook and talk at the same time, beer in hand, everyone gathered around the same surface instead of one person stranded at a rectangular grill while the party moved on without them.
story.p3: When I moved to Barcelona in 2022, I fell for the Spanish way of eating — long evenings outside, tapas that last for hours, food as the reason everyone stays at the table. And it struck me that this grill, the one we'd loved for a decade in Germany, belonged here. A product made for exactly this kind of evening, in a country that lives for them.
story.p4: Charcoal grills are banned in many city centers because of the smoke. Barcelona is full of rooftop terraces with nowhere to cook. Plancha360 runs on gas — fast to heat, low smoke, easy to clean — which makes social outdoor cooking possible even in the middle of a city.
story.p5: That's why Plancha360 exists. To bring a German garden secret to Spanish evenings.

models.headline: Two sizes. Same idea.
models.model700Description: 70 cm cooking surface. Built for terraces, smaller groups, and easier setups. Comes with two grilling spatulas.
models.model900Description: 90 cm cooking surface. Built for bigger gatherings and serious hosting. Comes with four grilling spatulas.
models.note: Both ship as a complete grill with a paella burner included. Already own a compatible burner? Order without one for less. A stainless-steel cover is available separately for year-round outdoor storage.

value.headline: Made for people who host.
value.lede: If you love being the one who brings people together — long dinners outside, friends in the garden, food that turns into an evening — this is built for you. Not a luxury object to show off. A tool that makes the gatherings you already love better.
value.point1Text: Cook and stay in the conversation at the same time.
value.point2Text: Fast heat, low smoke, easy cleanup. Use it on a Tuesday, not just a birthday.
value.point3Text: Solid steel, made in Spain, built to outlive every grill you've owned.

waitlist.incentiveSub: Everyone who signs up gets €50 off the launch price. Applied automatically — no code needed.
waitlist.headline: Be first when Plancha360 opens.
waitlist.lede: The first grills ship in August 2026, in a limited first batch. Join the waitlist to get early access, launch pricing, and updates as we go from prototype to product.
waitlist.successText: We'll be in touch with early access and launch pricing before August 2026.
